description.en: IfTransformerFactory.getFeature(String)returns true when passed this value as an argument, the Transformer supports Source input of this type.

description.en: IfTransformerFactory.getFeature(String)returns true when passed this value as an argument, thenewXMLFilter(Source src)andnewXMLFilter(Templates templates)methods are supported.
